detail.description: Weston Wilson homers (3) on a fly ball to left field.

Weston Wilson singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Jorge Barrosa.
Weston Wilson homers (2) on a fly ball to left field.

Weston Wilson doubles (1) on a sharp fly ball to left fielder Angel Martínez. Pete Alonso scores. Dylan Beavers scores. Leody Taveras to 3rd.
